goal: Replace every static page placeholder with loading, empty, success, and error states driven by the shared client layer.
constraints: Do NOT edit any file in the frozen shell list (ShellClient.js, Sidebar.js, Topbar.js, MobileNav.js)
Do NOT edit app/globals.css or tailwind.config.js
Every user-visible async path must have: loading skeleton OR spinner, empty state, error message with retry
Chat send must be non-blocking — UI stays responsive during stream
No dead buttons: every button must either do something or be explicitly disabled with a visible reason
Mobile layout must not regress — test at 375 px and 768 px viewports
done_criteria: Home page: status hero card reflects live fetchHealth() result with loading + error states
Chat page: ChatWindow sends via streamChat(), renders delta tokens as they arrive, shows error on failure
History page: list from getHistory() with loading skeleton, empty state for zero turns, error state with retry
Connect page: platform cards show live listChannels() connected state, not static mock
Connect/[platform] page: SetupWizard uses PLATFORMS from platform-meta.js, completion writes to listChannels
Health page: all diagnostic rows populated from fetchHealth() response, no MOCK_HEALTH remaining
npm run build passes with 0 errors
No MOCK_ prefixed constants remain in app/ or components/ (grep check)
escalation_rules: Escalate to coordinator if a page needs to own a file listed in SDK agent scope
Escalate if chat stream produces layout scroll-jump at > 50 tokens that cannot be fixed without editing ShellClient.js
Escalate if health endpoint returns a field not in contracts-lock decisions.health
Escalate to backend-contract agent if any endpoint returns an unexpected schema

output_contract.format: React Server Components and Client Components in Next.js App Router
